# Pull Request

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Performance Improvement

---

## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR introduces.

Explain the problem being solved and the reasoning behind the implementation.

---

## Architectural Impact

- Does this change affect the domain layer?
- Does it introduce new ports/adapters?
- Does it modify infrastructure behavior?
- Does it impact real-time processing?

Describe architectural considerations if applicable.

---

## Scope

- [ ] Backend – Domain
- [ ] Backend – Application
- [ ] Backend – Infrastructure
- [ ] Vision Engine
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] DevOps / Docker
- [ ] Documentation

---

## Implementation Details

Summarize design choices and trade-offs considered.

---

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added
- [ ] Integration tests added
- [ ] Manual test performed
- [ ] Not applicable

Describe how this was tested.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows Hexagonal Architecture principles
- [ ] No business logic inside infrastructure layer
- [ ] No direct DB calls inside domain layer
- [ ] Environment variables documented
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)

---

## Related Issue / Milestone

Reference related issue if applicable.

---

## Notes

Additional context if needed.
